name: Attribution Model Comparison
description: Compare attribution models side-by-side against the same opportunity dataset, surface where they disagree, and recommend a canonical model with rationale. Replaces 4–6 hours of MOps reconciliation per cycle with a defensible memo in minutes.
alsoSurfaces: Where do our attribution models disagree, and by how much, on which channels?
Which model should be canonical for board reporting, and why?
How much credit shifts between last-touch and multi-touch on the same deals?
How confident can we be in the canonical recommendation given our data completeness?
beforeWeRun: Which models — last-touch, first-touch, linear, U/W-shaped, time-decay, custom?
Time window — last 90 days, last quarter, or custom?
Anchor metric — SQL opportunity count or pipeline value?

whatYoullGet.name: Situation
whatYoullGet.desc: Total qualified pipeline, opportunity count, and the top channel under each selected model.

whatYoullGet.name: Where models disagree
whatYoullGet.desc: Channels-by-models matrix showing attributed pipeline under each model, with disagreement-flagged channels.

whatYoullGet.name: The big disagreements
whatYoullGet.desc: Top 3 channels by maximum pairwise disagreement, each with a narrative explaining why.

whatYoullGet.name: Recommendation
whatYoullGet.desc: A single canonical model named explicitly, with usage / completeness / defensibility rationale and a confidence rating.

whatYoullGet.name: Sources & definitions
whatYoullGet.desc: Every formula, source, row count, channel mapping, and Stage 0 resolution traced.

callout: 6 quick inputs, then Sage drafts your model-comparison memo in ~12 min.
